'''Andra''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Carida system/Legends|Carida system]]. Like all planets in the Carida system, Andra was destroyed when the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] apprentice [[Kyp Durron]] launched a missile from the [[Sun Crusher]].

{{Planet-stub}}
